name: xiangqi-analyzer
description: 象棋 AI 分析講解軟體 — Pikafish 引擎 + LLM 結構化解釋 (MVP)
author: xiangqi-analyzer

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.test: tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/rules.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/playOkWxf.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/playOkSources.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/playOkAcceptanceArtifacts.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/playOkSoakArtifacts.test.ts && electron tests/support/run-secret-store-test.cjs && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.web.json tests/unit/renderer/credentialBinding.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.web.json tests/unit/renderer/liveAnalysisTable.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/main/appData.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/main/providers.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/knowledge.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/dualEngine.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/main/license.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/main/logger.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/security/security.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/main/sessionStore.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/main/engineRegistry.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/integration/ai/harness.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/unit/shared/quality.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/architecture/rendererArchitecture.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.web.json tests/integration/renderer/actualMoveFlow.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.web.json tests/integration/renderer/playOkImportFlow.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.web.json tests/architecture/boardAccessibility.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json tests/e2e/engine.e2e.ts
scripts.dist:update: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.publish.cjs --publish never
